text_block_list.text:
Today, Gold City wanted a change of scenery, so
I took her out for the day. On our way back to the
academy...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer. Isn't there anywhere else you want
to go?
choice_data_list: All that's left is to head back...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
choice_data_list: Is there somewhere you wanted to drop by?
Is there somewhere you wanted to drop by?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Not especially. That's why I asked you.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
One time, when my manager was driving me to
work after school, we passed by some students in
uniform.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I could hear them from inside the car. They were
talking about how their evening out was just
getting started.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
It was already getting dark, so it was like, how are
you "just getting started" when places are about
to close?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But they sounded like they were literally having
the time of their lives, and it just stuck with me
even after I got to the studio.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Well, if it isn't City. You two out and about too?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh... Inari. No, we're actually on our way back.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaat?! You're goin' home? The party's just
gettin' started!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
You're missin' out! C'mon, follow me! I'll show you
how to spend the evenin'.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But...
choice_data_list: We might as well. Maybe we'll learn something.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Are you sure?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Your trainer knows what I'm talkin' about!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
City, you ready? Time is money, so we gotta run
at top speed!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: W-wait, Trainer can't keep up with us...
choice_data_list: I'll meet you at the destination.
You two go have fun together.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Well... if you say so.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What's gotten you all concerned? You wanna stay
with your trainer that much?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I-it's not like that! I'm not a child!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha—you're right, though. If we're gonna have
fun, we should all enjoy it together—especially
when it comes to watchin' a race!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Huh? But it's a weekday, and it's already late.
Tokyo Racecourse won't be hosting any...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What do you mean?! Don't tell me you forgot
another one of our great racecourses!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Whoa...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha, can you feel the energy? Oi Racecourse
is where dirt and spirit come together to dance.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: By the way, are you on that Umagram thingy too?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm on Umastagram, if that's what you mean...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Oh, then you wanna go take some pics? There's
this supposedly great spot Falco won't stop
talkin' about.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Falco, huh? Then it's probably somewhere
picturesque, yeah? Heh, Jordan might be into it
too.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Also, there's lots of interestin' foods to try. Why
don't we take a look around?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Yeah, let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Wait, hold on! The field's entering the paddock
for the next race!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Oh my gosh, which should we check out? I'm
literally so torn!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha, such an innocent soul. You must be havin' a
blast.

Gold City's eyes twinkle with excitement like a
child's.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
That's what I like to hear, Trainer! Sounds like you
know exactly how to have fun after school.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
The trick is—no grown-ups allowed! Us students
need our time to ourselves!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But...
choice_data_list:
Just send me a text whenever you're ready to
come back.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, City, don't let this chance go to waste.
Let's go!

I part ways with Gold City. Later, after doing
some shopping at the shopping district...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer. You're on your way back?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Yup! First we hit up the arcade, then we got
honeyade, then we went to a public bath, and...

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Haha, you're way too excited. Look, you're scarin'
your trainer.

Gold City's cheeks are flushed. It seems she really
enjoyed her time out on the town.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
What's this? Has the sight of a lass fresh out of
the bath rattled your noggin?

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Haha, I'm askin' if you're swooning at the sight. You got that dreamy look on your face.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What are you saying, Inari?!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Hey now, hey now, what're you gettin' all flustered for? Your trainer's standin' right in front of two drop-dead beauties here.

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: Or what, did you think you were the only one?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Ugh, Inari!
Gold City blushes as Inari One laughs teasingly.
